data.interface_name: According SN to Set charging information
data.interface_content:
##### Description

- According SN to Set charging information，Setting frequency 24 hours, set once a day

##### Request URL
- ` https://openapi.alphaess.com/api/updateChargeConfigInfo `
  
##### Request Type
- POST

##### Headers Parameter

|Fields|Requires|Type|Description|
|:----    |:---|:----- |-----   |
|appId |Yes |string |AppID   |
|timeStamp |Yes |long| Unix timestamp is used to confirm validity of your request. If the timespan between request timestamp and server timestamp exceeds 300 seconds, then the request will be rejected.How to calculate the unix timestamp?(DateTime.UtcNow-new DateTime(1970,1,1)).TotalSeconds，For example，2022-12-20 10:54:06（Beijing Time） ，this timestamp is 1671507191，url：https://tool.lu/timestamp/|
|sign     |Yes  |string | appId+appSecret+timeStamp，then use Sha512 Encryption 。For example：appId：alphaef7900ee81dbbce9，appSecret：c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c，timeStamp：1676353875，before encryption：alphaef7900ee81dbbce9c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c1676353875，SHA512after encryption：0f023c2287b8f6b21b0994947465f8e9de0e1542567b1735bdc6c427336b9b6406285cd94f9215c3e9af958df37fb11c2c9fe792713d8afbdb8c463359a1add8  |
##### Request Parameter

|Fields|Requires|Type|Description|
|:----    |:---|:----- |-----   |
|sysSn   |Yes  |string | System S/N  | 
|batHighCap|Yes|decimal| Charging Stops at SOC [%]
|gridCharge|Yes|int|Enable Grid Charging Battery
|timeChae1|Yes|string|Charging Period 1 end time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect
|timeChae2|Yes|string|Charging Period 2 end time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect
|timeChaf1|Yes|string|Charging Period 1 start time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect
|timeChaf2|Yes|string|Charging Period 2 start time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect

##### Response Parameter

|Fields|Type|Description|
|:----    |:----|:----- |-----   |
|code|int   |Return Code |
|msg|string   |Return Message|
|data|data  |Return Data|
